description: CompositionGrey capris made of a cotton-polyester-spandex blend fabric, has a mid rise waist, embroidered brand logo on the waistband and lime green panel on the back below the waistbandFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursUse mild detergentDo not bleachLine dry inside-out in shadeDo not iron directly on print/embroideryDo not dry cleanLightweight and stretchable, this blended training capris from nike is ideal when indulging in fitness or sporting activities, as it allows for easy body movement. The breathable fabric helps you stay dry while you sweat it out, and the mid-rise waist holds the pants in place. The nike swoosh near the left hip adds that unique sense of style to the outfit.
